---
title: "Privacy Policy"
page-layout: article
---

This Privacy Policy describes how AI·DATA LAB ("this site") collects and uses information.

## Information We Collect

This site may collect the following information.

- Visitor statistics (anonymous data via Google Analytics)
- Email address provided when subscribing to newsletters

## Google Analytics

This site uses Google Analytics to collect visitor statistics. Google Analytics uses cookies, and collected data is processed anonymously. You can review Google's Privacy Policy [here](https://policies.google.com/privacy).

## Google AdSense

This site displays advertisements through Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to show ads based on your interests. To opt out of personalized advertising, visit [Google Ad Settings](https://adssettings.google.com).

## Cookies

This site uses cookies to enhance user experience. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may be limited.

## Third-Party Links

This site may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites.

## Changes to This Policy

This policy may be updated as needed. Any changes will be reflected on this page.

## Contact

For any privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at:

- Email: phyzik@example.ac.kr

*Last updated: April 2026*
